title: Claude Fable 5 designs a 3D-printable model in a Claude-built CAD editor
summary: Claude Fable 5 is demonstrated designing a 3D-printable model using a browser-based CAD editor. The CAD editor and its integrated AI copilot were both built by Claude Fable 5.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 designing a 3D-printable model inside a browser-based CAD editor. Both the CAD editor and its integrated AI copilot were built by Claude Fable 5, putting the same model on both sides of the task: the tool and the user of the tool. The demonstration covers the model generating the application via code generation and then operating it to produce a printable design.
